since_last: 50% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.97%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 50% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.77% · BTC +0.39% · Gold +0.75% · Nasdaq100 -0.93%. 50% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.97%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.97%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.30%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -13.08%
cards.body: Leaders: LEU +5.81%, SKHY +4.64%, MU +4.34%, ARM +3.81%, DELL +3.16%. Laggards: ISRG -13.08%, PUBM -5.43%, BIDU -4.08%, SPCX -4.07%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.07% at $125.78
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.07% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
